But it'd be easy to do my own products. I want to do somebody else's product. It'd be more fun if I'm pitching somebody else's product. I want to show you guys how much fun. What are the Pifty Brits' stories I have for those? All those. So I think I have everything I need. Okay. Any other questions? Who wants to see me try to pitch this? I'm so excited. Now you can sit down if you want to. Give us a round of applause by the way. Applause.
